stemHtml: MLS installations notified for operation unless otherwise stated, provide azimuth coverage of:

options.a: ±20° about the nominal course line out to a range of 20 NM.
options.b: ±40° about the nominal course line out to a range of 20 NM.
options.c: ±20° about the nominal course line out to a range of 10 NM.
options.d: ±40° about the nominal course line out to a range of 30 NM.
